files.patch:
@@ -20,9 +20,9 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 15
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
-      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
           node-version: "24"

@@ -141,7 +141,7 @@ jobs:
       issues: write
       pull-requests: write
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
         with:
           fetch-depth: 0
           persist-credentials: false
@@ -187,7 +187,7 @@ jobs:
           owner: ${{ steps.target.outputs.target_repo_owner }}
           repositories: ${{ steps.target.outputs.target_repo_name }}
 
-      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
           node-version: "24"
 
@@ -371,7 +371,7 @@ jobs:
       target_repo_name: ${{ steps.target.outputs.target_repo_name }}
       target_repo_owner: ${{ steps.target.outputs.target_repo_owner }}
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
         with:
           path: clawsweeper
           fetch-depth: 0
@@ -408,7 +408,7 @@ jobs:
           owner: ${{ steps.target.outputs.target_repo_owner }}
           repositories: ${{ steps.target.outputs.target_repo_name }}
 
-      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
           node-version: "24"
 
@@ -564,7 +564,7 @@ jobs:
       matrix:
         include: ${{ fromJson(needs.plan.outputs.matrix) }}
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
         with:
           path: clawsweeper
           fetch-depth: 0
@@ -579,7 +579,7 @@ jobs:
           owner: ${{ needs.plan.outputs.target_repo_owner }}
           repositories: ${{ needs.plan.outputs.target_repo_name }}
 
-      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
           node-version: "24"
 
@@ -670,7 +670,7 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 60
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
         with:
           fetch-depth: 0
 
@@ -685,7 +685,7 @@ jobs:
           permission-issues: write
           permission-pull-requests: write
 
-      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
           node-version: "24"
 
@@ -884,7 +884,7 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 45
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
         with:
           fetch-depth: 0
 
@@ -919,7 +919,7 @@ jobs:
           owner: ${{ steps.target.outputs.target_repo_owner }}
           repositories: ${{ steps.target.outputs.target_repo_name }}
 
-      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
           node-version: "24"
 
@@ -969,7 +969,7 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 360
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
         with:
           fetch-depth: 0
 
@@ -1006,7 +1006,7 @@ jobs:
           permission-issues: write
           permission-pull-requests: write
 
-      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
           node-version: "24"
